text:
RepoPulse forecast (7-day breakout watchlist)

Method: reproducible baseline model using public GitHub signals (no LLM).
Breakout = +max(200 stars, +50%) within 7 days.

1) RightNow-AI/openfang | 96% | stars now 9373 → est 23513 (range 23469-23557)
   https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang
2) maderix/ANE | 96% | stars now 3175 → est 13485 (range 13460-13510)
   https://github.com/maderix/ANE
3) agentscope-ai/CoPaw | 96% | stars now 6280 → est 14660 (range 14625-14695)
   https://github.com/agentscope-ai/CoPaw
4) cloudflare/vinext | 95% | stars now 5504 → est 12882 (range 12845-12919)
   https://github.com/cloudflare/vinext
5) Lakr233/vphone-cli | 95% | stars now 2801 → est 8295 (range 8270-8320)
   https://github.com/Lakr233/vphone-cli

Daily forecasts are logged publicly, then scored 7 days later (hits, misses, calibration).
#opensource #software #datascience #forecasting #github
